p2p_enrich.notes: Added 5 pass_to_pass tests with origin: repo_tests. Helm not available in Docker, used Python-based validations: Chart.yaml validation, Chart dependencies check, values.yaml sections check, Go template syntax check (balanced braces), _helpers.tpl patterns check. All 5 new p2p tests pass on base commit. Docker build successful.

rubric_enrichment.rejection_reasons: Config files contain TypeScript/React coding conventions (types over interfaces, no enums, no default exports, vitest tests, pnpm format). PR only modifies Helm chart YAML files and templates - no overlap.

validate.notes: Fixed test_readme_no_toplevel_ingress_example which used line.strip() == 'ingress:' - this incorrectly matched properly nested 'ingress:' keys (2-space indented) under webapp: and registry:. Changed to line.startswith('ingress:') to only catch bare top-level ingress:. All 4 validations now pass: Docker build OK, NOP test reward=0 (12 tests fail on buggy base), Gold test reward=1 (19 tests pass). Rubric judge shows 0.5 due to LLM evaluation error but rubric is empty and content is verified correct.
